title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at LG Soft India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at LG Soft India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? LG Soft India Holdings Services in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
